name: add-linear
tagline: Adds a Linear issue-comment channel to NanoClaw via Chat SDK: copies the adapter, pins the package, sets secrets, wires the agent.
verdict: Well-built integration skill: pinned dependency, idempotent-by-design steps, secrets kept in .env without echoing, and thorough troubleshooting coverage. Weak spots: description states what it does but not when to trigger it (Q01), the wiring 'create' commands aren't shown handling re-runs despite a blanket idempotency claim (Q10), and there's no version or.

highlights.summary: description says what it does ('Add Linear channel integration via Chat SDK') but never states when a user would invoke it.
`ncl messaging-groups create` / `ncl wirings create` in the wire step have no shown check for a pre-existing group/wiring, despite the skill's claim that every directive is idempotent.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
